programme.title: The Loud House
programme.sub-title: Clyde Can't Decide; Shred of Evidence
programme.desc: After Clyde can't get a hold of his therapist, Dr. Lopez, he spirals and struggles to make even the smallest decisions; Lola and her nemesis, Lindsey Sweetwater, join forces to uncover a mystery while competing at a pageant.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: While at Kamp Koral for a reunion, SpongeBob and the gang are stalked by a mysterious figure lurking in the shadows as campers start disappearing one by one.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Hotel Transylvania: Transformania
programme.desc: Van Helsing's mysterious new invention transforms Drac and his pals into humans, and Johnny into a monster. With their new mismatched bodies, Drac and the pack must find a way to switch themselves back before their transformations become permanent.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

Instituto Nacional de Cine y Artes Audiovisuales

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: The friends stay at a beach house; Phoebe meets someone who knows details about her family; Rachel expresses her jealousy of Ross' uninhibited girlfriend.

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: Ross dates Rachel again after unwittingly agreeing to take responsibility for their breakup; Phoebe reconciles with her mother; Monica is stung by a jellyfish.

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: While the gang waits for the reopening of Stuart's comic book store Wolowitz gets some shocking news; Penny has trouble taking her own advice; Leonard and Raj think they spot Nathan Fillion at a restaurant.

programme.desc: Amy finds out that Sheldon applied for a one-way mission to colonize Mars; a trip to the pet store leads to a fight; Leonard has a surprise for Penny; Raj is busted while snooping in Emily's apartment.

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: Phoebe becomes convinced that the spirit of her dead mother is inside a cat; Chandler and Joey are robbed; Monica goes on a date with a guy from her high school.

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: Rachel's boss, Joanna, leaves Chandler in an awkward situation that will require Rachel's help; Monica's catering fiasco.

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One With the Ballroom Dancing
programme.desc: Joey intervenes when the superintendent, Mr. Treeger, moves to evict Rachel and Monica; Chandler tries to quit a health club.

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One With Joey's New Girlfriend
programme.desc: Chandler falls for a woman who is already involved with Joey; Rachel and Ross play the jealousy game.

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One With the Dirty Girl
programme.desc: Ross starts dating a beautiful but messy co-worker from the museum; Monica and Phoebe cater a sad event.

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One Where Chandler Crosses the Line
programme.desc: Chandler faces a tough choice after his passionate kiss with Joey's girlfriend; Rachel has to learn about dining alone.

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One With Chandler in a Box
programme.desc: To atone for kissing Joey's girlfriend, Chandler agrees to stay inside a shipping crate during the Thanksgiving holiday.

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One Where They're Going to Party!
programme.desc: Rachel's career is obstructed by her boss, Joanna; Monica faces a big decision; Chandler, Ross and Joey party.

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Phil talks Jay into investing in a property he has long wanted to develop; Claire's culinary ventures aren't as successful as she thinks; Cam and Mitchell try to teach Lily the value of hard work.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.sub-title: The Ghost of Plankton; My Two Krabses

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.sub-title: Knock Knock, Who's There?; Pat Hearts Squid
programme.desc: SpongeBob watches Mr. Krabs' house while he's away and takes extreme measures to make sure no one breaks in; Squidward is forced to room with Patrick.

programme.title: Trolls World Tour
programme.desc: Poppy and Branch discover that there are six different troll tribes scattered over six different lands. Each tribe is also devoted to six different kinds of music -- funk, country, techno, classical, pop and rock. When rockers Queen Barb and King Thrash set out to destroy the other music, Poppy and Branch embark on a daring mission to unite the trolls and save the diverse melodies from becoming extinct.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: SpongeBob experiences a bad luck streak when his lucky tie clip suddenly goes missing.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.sub-title: The Krusty Bucket; Squid's on a Bus
programme.desc: Plankton creates a clone of himself and Mr. Krabs, but neither restaurant is safe from the newcomer; Squidward gleefully switches jobs with a bus driver for an easy ride, until SpongeBob and Patrick climb aboard.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: SpongeBob and Patrick are sent to jail in the underground tunnels of Glove World, leading to a daring escape.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: SpongeBob breaks his precious alarm clock, but nothing else is loud enough to wake him up on time; Karen quickly learns that kids grow up too fast after her new child arrives in the mail.

programme.sub-title: Under the Small Top; Squidward's Sick Daze

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: Frustrated that he's seen as cute instead of evil, Plankton builds a robot to punish anyone who says "aww!"; Patrick crushes the mailman, so he and SpongeBob deliver the mail around Bikini Bottom.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants

programme.sub-title: Hot Crossed Nuts; Sir Urchin and Snail Fail

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: SpongeBob celebrates the anniversary of his friendship with Squidward, but Squidward doesn't; Squidward's lack of talent lands him in a court ordered music class.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.sub-title: Dopey Dick; Plankton and the Beanstalk
programme.desc: Squidward joins a crew of sailors hunting down the great white jellyfish; Plankton finds a magic bean that takes him to a land of giants.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: SpongeBob befriends a sentient Krabby Patty whose only wish is to be eaten; Rube hosts an episode of "FUN-Believable! With Rube" where he explores little known oddities and attractions around Bikini Bottom.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.sub-title: Spatula of the Heavens; Gary's Playhouse
programme.desc: SpongeBob embarks on an epic journey to have his beloved spatula reforged by the legendary Guru Greasetrap; SpongeBob builds a snail-house outside for Gary to play in while he is at work.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.sub-title: Chatterbox Gary; Don't Feed the Clowns
programme.desc: Gary has a pet translation collar, and he's talking up a storm; when a small clown gets left behind by the circus, SpongeBob takes the hapless harlequin under his wing.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: When the Krusty Krab runs out of mustard, Mr. Krabs sends SpongeBob, Patrick and Squidward to dig up some more; SpongeBob and Sandy have to collect Krabby Patty ingredients, but Plankton follows their every step.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: SpongeBob and Patrick exchange tiny living versions of themselves; Plankton tells his grandma that he owns the Krusty Krab, but must keep the lie going when she comes to visit.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: Plankton tells Patrick he's his conscience so he can convince the wooden-headed star to steal him a Krabby Patty; when Mr. Krabs puts in an open kitchen, SpongeBob gets stage fright and has to invent a new persona.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: Rachel and Ross reminisce separately about when they dated each other; the friends get invitations to Ross's wedding, but not all of them are going.

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One With the Worst Best Man Ever
programme.desc: After Joey almost loses Ross' wedding ring, Ross asks both Joey and Chandler to serve as his best man; the girls host a baby shower for Phoebe.

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: Rachel, Monica, Joey, Chandler and Ross go to London for the wedding where Joey meets Sarah Ferguson, the Duchess of York.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: Rachel frantically tries to get to London to tell Ross that she loves him before he marries Emily; Ross' parents argue with Emily's parents, Steven and Andrea Waltham.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação
